name: German Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan over low heat, melt the broken chocolate with water, stirring until smooth. Set aside.
2. Cream butter and sugar together until light and fluffy. Add egg yolks one at a time, beating after each addition. Mix in melted chocolate and vanilla.
3. Sift flour and baking soda together. Gradually add dry ingredients to the chocolate mixture alternately with buttermilk until smooth.
4. Beat egg whites with salt until very stiff peaks form. Gently fold this into the batter.
5. Pour the batter evenly into three 8 or 9-inch round cake pans lined with wax paper.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 35 minutes. Cool on a rack for 10 minutes before removing from pans.
7. Frost with Butter Pecan Frosting.
